artPrompt: The cataclysmic instant a shaft of cold gold radiance lances down from a blood-dark sky to obliterate a kneeling tapped figure, its silhouette flung backward and disintegrating into ash and sparks in steep foreshortening. Guttering candles scatter from the impact; the doomsday clock tower looms behind through smoke, the divine bolt searing the frame top to bottom, kinetic and merciless, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Smite the Doubtful
text:
Destroy target tapped creature. It doubted, and it was tapped, and now it is smitten.
If there are six or more doom counters on the Doomsday Clock, you may instead destroy target creature, tapped or not. Doubt is everywhere now.
flavorText: Reserved for those who said "that'll never happen."
